name: Daemonic Patrons
community_notes: community-authored from 10e source (provisional 11e); see #21. Crit-Wound grant applies to all attacks (no weapon-type restriction); the end-of-phase self-destruction cannot encode the by-this-unit kill attribution, so it gates on any enemy destroyed that phase.
